description: 1-layer d_model=4 transformer (no LayerNorm). Uniform causal attention averages 'is_one_bit' to produce N1/11 at the '=' position; MLP with 11 ReLU hinges acts as a piecewise-linear lookup mapping N1/11 to parity(N1); head reads parity to choose '0' vs '1'.

Same circuit as ParityUniformAttnLookupMLP but compressed to d_model=3 by reusing channel 0 (which is zero at the '=' position) to hold the MLP-computed parity. V has gain 11 so attention emits N1 directly. 1 layer, 1 head, d_ff=11, no LayerNorm.

d_model=3, 1 head, 1 layer, d_ff=10, no LayerNorm. Uniform attention places N1 in channel 2 at the '=' position; the MLP computes -2*floor(N1/2) using 5 step-difference ReLU pairs (10 neurons), transforming channel 2 in place into parity(N1) = N1 - 2*floor(N1/2). Head reads channel 2 to choose '0' vs '1'.

d_model=3, 1 head, 1 layer, d_ff=9, no LayerNorm. Same N - 2*floor(N/2) in-place parity circuit as ParityInPlaceFloorSub, with the always-zero h_10 neuron dropped (since N1 <= 10 makes ReLU(N1 - 10) trivially 0). Minimal ReLU width for this approach.
